Company Information

Regional Settings

Alert Thresholds

E-Way Bill Integration

Connected
2025 Mandate: 2FA is mandatory for all e-invoice and e-way bill generation from April 1, 2025. Ensure your company's e-way bill portal credentials support MFA.
GSP handles authentication, encryption, and NIC communication. Recommended over direct NIC integration.
Same as company GSTIN for own-fleet. Different for subcontracted trips.
Compliance Validation Rules (2025)
Document date must be within 180 days from generation date
Extension limited to 360 days from original generation
Cancellation only within 24 hours of generation
Blocked GSTIN detection — alert Finance if returns unfiled for 2 periods
EWB expiry alert at 8 hours before expiration
